tasks.dev: deno task build && deno desktop -A --hmr --include ./dist main.ts
tasks.build:macos: deno task build && deno desktop -A --include ./dist -o ./release/macos/MyApp.app main.ts
tasks.build:windows: deno task build && deno desktop -A --include ./dist -o ./release/windows/MyApp main.ts
tasks.build:linux: deno task build && deno desktop -A --include ./dist -o ./release/linux/my-app main.ts
